title: dryopteris chrysotricha
intro: Dryopteris chrysotricha, also known as the golden rattlesnake fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its golden-brown rachises and dark green fronds. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where its leaves and stems are employed to treat various health conditions due to their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris chrysotricha include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
